title: Customer tax IDs
excerpt: Store, validate, and render customer tax ID numbers with Stripe Invoicing. Need another tax ID type? Request additional Tax ID types by emailing [stripe-tax@stripe.com](mailto:stripe-tax@stripe.com?subject=Request). Displaying a customer’s tax ID on *invoice* (Invoices are statements of amounts owed by a customer. They track the status of payments from draft through paid or otherwise finalized. Subscriptions automatically generate invoices, or you can manually create a one-off invoice) documents is a common requirement that you can satisfy by adding tax IDs to customers. A customer’s tax IDs display in the header of invoice and credit note PDFs.…
